meaning: n.[植]广藿香,天竺薄荷,广藿香油(制香料用)
examples: The usage of patchouli in perfume has been increasing since the 19th century.
Recognizing its insect-repellant properties, the traders of silk and cashmere used patchouli leaves to fold inside their wares.
The main traditional USES for patchouli were as a tonic. Patchouli has also been used as a stimulant and as an antiseptic.
For instance, chemists have not yet figured out an easy way to make a synthetic patchouli scent.
Somewhere between pepper-spray and patchouli is a middle ground, and that ground should be safe for pregnant women to sit on without risk.
